titleStmt.title: SII 9.544: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 544. (A.R. No. 387 of 1920.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE ANJANEYASVAMI TEMPLE AT GADEKALLU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Māgha, ba. 14, Śivarātre corresponding to A.D. 1532 February 3, Monday (not verifiable), in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Lakumiseṭṭi, son of Muttina Lakumiseṭṭi, the officer in charge of the vajra-bhaṇḍāra at Karūru in the Uruvakoṇḍe-sīme which was granted to Yallapaṇṇa by the king made a gift of land in the village Gaḍēkallu to Koṇḍā-Jyōsya, son of Purushōttama-Bhaṭṭa of Polaki, and also some other land in the same village to Bhūsi-Bhaṭṭa, son of Kantrike Siri-Bhaṭṭa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1453 naya kharasaṁvatsara
da māgha bahuḷa 14 śivarātri pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu Accyutaraya
mahārāyaru yallapaṁṇagaḷige pāllisida vuruvakoṁḍe sīme vo
ḷagaṇa karūra vajrabhaṁḍārake karttarāda muttina llakimiseṭṭiyara makaḷu lakamise
ṭigaḷu tavu Āḷuva gaḍekala gramadalu polaki koṁḍājyōśyarige pūrvadali yikuḷada
hola sarvamānyavāgi naḍavutihudu Ā lakmiseṭigaḷu yalapaṁṇagaḷige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgi
Ā sivārātri puṇyakāladallu polakiya puruṣōttamabaṭra makaḷu koṁḍājyōśyarige yikuḷada hola
nū dhāraneredu grāmadalli kuṭuṁbavāsavāgi yirabēku yeṁdu vubhayaṁ nāgguḷada bījavari
ya holanū grāmake nayirutyabhāgadalu gaviraḍi māḍida kṣētravanu Ā kṣētradallu bā
haṁthā Aṣṭabhōga tēja svā(ṁ)mya muṁtāgi sarvamā(ṁ)nyavu koṭu Ācaṁdrārkastāyiga
ḷāgi niṁma putrapavutrapāraṁpariyavu �yo sarvamā(ṁ)nya Anu
bhavisikoṁḍu sukhadalu yihudū yeṁ
du koṭa muttina lakimiseṭiyaru māḍida bhū
dānada silālikhitavu . yī jyōśyara
mā(ṁ)nyadoḷage Ārobbaru Aḷippi Abhilāṣebaṭṭu tekkoṁḍḍavaru ta(ṁ)mma
mātrupitrugaḷanū gōbrā(ṁ)hmaranū vāraṇāsi voḷage koṁda dōṣadali hōda
Avāru . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāścrēyōnrupālanaṁ . dānasvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyuthaṁ padaṁ .
kharasaṁvatsarada māga bahuḷa 14 sivarātrepu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu mutina lakimiseṭa
ra makkaḷu lakimiseṭigaḷū kaṁtrikeyā siribhaṭāra makaḷū bhūsibhaṭarige yikuḷada kṣētravanu dhāreneradū tā
U Āḷuvaṁta gaḍiyakala grāmadalu baḍagalu kōṭerāmainū māḍuva holadoḷage yikuḷada bījavari
�yo kṣētravanū Aṣṭabhōga tēja svāmya muṁtāgi sarvamānyau sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdaka sahitavāgi
dhāreneredu koṭevu nīu ni(ṁ)mma putrapavutrapāraṁpariyavu Āceṁdrārkkastāyigaḷāgi grāmadalu kuṭuṁ
basthāyiyāgi sukhadalu yihūdu yaṁdu koṭaṁthā mutina lakumiseṭaru māḍida bhūdānada silāli
khitavu yī koṁḍājyōśyara mā(ṁ)nyadoḷage busibhaṭramā(ṁ)nyadoḷage Ārobaru Abhila
ṣebaṭṭu tekoṁḍare taṁma mātrupitrugaḷanu kāsikṣētradoḷage vadhisidaṁthā pātakadalu hōharu .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō haraṁti vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi vriṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimi[ḥ .*]
Digital edition of SII 9.544 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
